introSection:
Light Explorers is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It opened on 14 July 2021.

The coaster is a clone of Saven at Fårup Sommerland in Denmark.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Light Explorers is part of a new-for-2021 expansion called Aqualantis at Energylandia.

fullText:
Light Explorers is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It opened on 14 July 2021.

The coaster is a clone of Saven at Fårup Sommerland in Denmark.

Light Explorers is part of a new-for-2021 expansion called Aqualantis at Energylandia.
